summary: Lead Import Module testing completed. Found and fixed a critical tenant_id bug in import endpoints. All 12 backend import API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI wizard works correctly - all 4 steps functional. Sidebar navigation includes 'Importar Leads' link.

critical.issue: Tenant ID mismatch - used get_or_create_tenant(user_id) instead of current_user['tenant_id'], causing imported leads to be saved to wrong tenant
critical.fix_applied: Changed both endpoints to use current_user['tenant_id'] instead of get_or_create_tenant(user_id)

passed_tests: Backend: Authentication with demo credentials
Backend: GET /api/import/fields - returns available field mappings
Backend: POST /api/import/upload - CSV file upload and header detection
Backend: Upload rejects invalid file types (.txt)
Backend: Upload requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/import/preview - column mapping and validation
Backend: Preview returns 404 for invalid job_id
Backend: POST /api/import/execute - creates leads in database
Backend: Duplicate detection and skip functionality
Backend: GET /api/import/jobs - returns job history
Backend: GET /api/import/template - returns CSV template
Backend: Full E2E import flow (upload → preview → execute → verify)
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: 'Importar Leads' link visible in sidebar
Frontend: Navigation to /import page works
Frontend: Step 1 - Upload file UI with drag & drop zone
Frontend: Step 2 - Column mapping interface with auto-suggestions
Frontend: Step 3 - Preview table with validation status
Frontend: Step 4 - Import result summary
Frontend: Spanish UI (Importar Leads, Subir Archivo, Mapear Columnas, Vista Previa, Resultado)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py lines 1898 and 2085 - tenant_id bug in import endpoints now resolved
seed_data_creation: Created test leads with prefixes TEST_Import_, E2E_Test_, UI_Test_ during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lead Import Module is fully functional. Backend endpoints at /api/import/upload, /api/import/preview, /api/import/execute all work correctly. Frontend ImportLeadsPage.js has 4-step wizard (Upload → Map Columns → Preview → Import). Auto column mapping detection works for common field names (Nombre→name, Email→email, etc.). Duplicate detection works via email or phone field. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_import_leads.py can be used as regression tests.

import_endpoints.upload: POST /api/import/upload - accepts CSV/XLSX, returns headers and mapping suggestions
import_endpoints.preview: POST /api/import/preview - validates data, checks duplicates, returns preview
import_endpoints.execute: POST /api/import/execute - creates leads, handles duplicates, returns results
import_endpoints.template: GET /api/import/template - returns CSV template with sample data

frontend_wizard.step1_upload: Drag & drop zone, file type validation (CSV, XLSX, XLS)
frontend_wizard.step2_mapping: Auto-suggestions, required/optional field separation, duplicate handling settings
frontend_wizard.step3_preview: Summary cards, preview table with validation status

bug_fixed.description: Tenant ID mismatch in import endpoints
bug_fixed.root_cause: get_or_create_tenant(user_id) generates tenant_id from user_id string prefix, but user's actual tenant_id from JWT was different
bug_fixed.impact: Imported leads were saved to wrong tenant, making them invisible to the user
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use current_user['tenant_id'] which comes from JWT token
